details.productUrlName: Tom Bert and William Extended Art

customAttributes.description:
1, Sacrifice another creature: Draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power, then discard a card.
When Tom, Bert, and William die, if they were a creature, return them to the battlefield. They're an artifact. (They're no longer a creature.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 8/14/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
